stemHtml: Which of the following loading methods is recommended for the transport of unconventional cargo?

options.a: Large and irregularly shaped cargo should be loaded as palletised cargo.
options.b: Large and irregularly shaped cargo can only be loaded in cargo-only aircraft.
options.c: Large and irregularly shaped cargo can best be loaded in containers.
options.d: Large and irregularly shaped cargo is ideally stored as bulk cargo.
